zh.lifeSummary: 當King of Halich Lev I. Danilovich Rurik於大約1228年出生在匈牙利時，他的父親King of Halich Danilo Romanovich Rurik28歲，母親Anna Mistislavna24歲。他於1253年與Boldog Konstancia Árpád-házi在匈牙利布達佩斯培斯特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1301年享年74歲，埋葬在烏克蘭ЛьвівськаЛьвовский районЛьвів。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当King of Halich Lev I. Danilovich Rurik于大约1228年出生在匈牙利时，他的父亲King of Halich Danilo Romanovich Rurik28岁，母亲Anna Mistislavna24岁。他于1253年与Boldog Konstancia Árpád-házi在匈牙利布達佩斯培斯特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1301年享年74岁，埋葬在乌克兰ЛьвівськаЛьвовский районЛьвів。

nameMeanings.name: Rurik
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Ukrainian and Rusyn (standard transliteration Buryk): nickname derived from buryy ‘dark brown’.

Slovak (mainly Burík and Búrik) and Rusyn (from Slovakia; also Burík): nickname from the archaic Slovak name burík for a (dark) gray horse, or derived directly from an adjective meaning ‘(dark) gray’ (in Slovak) or ‘dark brown’ (in Rusyn; compare 1 above).
Czech (Buřík): variant of Buřič (see Buric 1). Compare Burick .

variants.name: Buric
meanings: Czech (Buřič) and Slovak (Burič): nickname from Czech buřič, Slovak burič ‘rebel’.

Serbian and Croatian (Burić): patronymic from Buro, which may be a short form of the old personal name Burislav (composed of the elements bur, from buriti se ‘to stir up’, + slav, from slava ‘glory’), or a nickname for a big-bellied man derived from the root of burav ‘bellied’.
Croatian (Burić): nickname derived from bura ‘north wind’ (see Bura 2) and given to a child born when this wind was blowing. Compare Burich and Burick .

variants.name: Burick
meanings: Americanized form of Ukrainian, Rusyn, and Slovak Burik or Czech Buřik.
Americanized form of Czech Buřič and Slovak Burič or Serbian and Croatian Burić (see Buric ).

nameMeanings.name: Lev
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Russian lev ‘lion’, hence a vernacular equivalent of Leo ( .

historicEvents.description: The Mongolian Tatars devastated the country. Their presence, which lasted a year, halted development for at least a century. After the warfare with the Hungarians, the Tatars did not continue towards the west.

en.lifeSummary: When King of Halich Lev I. Danilovich Rurik was born about 1228, in Hungary, his father, King of Halich Danilo Romanovich Rurik, was 28 and his mother, Anna Mistislavna, was 24. He married Boldog Konstancia Árpád-házi in 1253, in Pest, Budapest, Hungary. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died in 1301, at the age of 74, and was buried in Lviv, Lviv, Lviv, Ukraine.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque King of Halich Lev I. Danilovich Rurik est né environ 1228, à Hongrie, son père, King of Halich Danilo Romanovich Rurik, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Anna Mistislavna, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Boldog Konstancia Árpád-házi en 1253, à Pest, Budapest, Hongrie. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1301, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterré à Lviv, Lviv, Lviv, Ukraine.

de.lifeSummary: Als King of Halich Lev I. Danilovich Rurik um 1228 in Ungarn geboren wurde, war sein Vater King of Halich Danilo Romanovich Rurik 28 und seine Mutter Anna Mistislavna 24. Er hat 1253 in Pest, Budapest, Ungarn Boldog Konstancia Árpád-házi geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1301 im Alter von 74 Jahren und wurde in Lviv, Lviv, Lviv, Ukraine begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando King of Halich Lev I. Danilovich Rurik è nato il circa 1228 nel Ungheria, il suo padre, King of Halich Danilo Romanovich Rurik, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Anna Mistislavna, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Boldog Konstancia Árpád-házi nel 1253, nel Pest, Budapest, Ungheria. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1301, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolto a Lviv, Lviv, Lviv, Ucraina.

ja.lifeSummary: King of Halich Lev I. Danilovich Rurikが約1228年にハンガリーで生まれた時，父King of Halich Danilo Romanovich Rurikは28歳，母Anna Mistislavnaは24歳であった。1253年にハンガリーブダペストペストでBoldog Konstancia Árpád-háziと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1301年に74歳で死去し，ウクライナЛьвівськаЛьвовский районЛьвівにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: King of Halich Lev I. Danilovich Rurik(이)가 대략 1228년 헝가리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 King of Halich Danilo Romanovich Rurik(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Anna Mistislavna(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1253년 헝가리 버다페스트 페스트에서 Boldog Konstancia Árpád-házi(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1301년 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 우크라이나 Львівська Львовский район Львів에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando King of Halich Lev I. Danilovich Rurik nasceu aproximadamente 1228, em Hungria, seu pai, King of Halich Danilo Romanovich Rurik, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Anna Mistislavna, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Boldog Konstancia Árpád-házi em 1253, em Pest, Budapest, Hungria. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1301, com 74 anos, e foi sepultado em Lviv, Lviv, Lviv, Ucrânia.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда King of Halich Lev I. Danilovich Rurik родился около 1228 г. в местности Венгрия, его отцу по имени King of Halich Danilo Romanovich Rurik было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Anna Mistislavna, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Boldog Konstancia Árpád-házi в 1253 г. в местности пест, будапест, Венгрия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1301 г. в возрасте 74 лет и был похоронен в местности Львов, Львовский район, Львовская, Украина.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando King of Halich Lev I. Danilovich Rurik nació aproximadamente 1228, en Hungría, su papá, King of Halich Danilo Romanovich Rurik, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Anna Mistislavna, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Boldog Konstancia Árpád-házi en 1253, en Pest, Budapest, Hungría. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1301, a la edad de 74 años, y fue sepultado en Lviv, Lviv, Lviv, Ucrania.
